CustomField.description: Reference field for the Initial Setup Call Completed Date populated on the Account OR SaaS Primary Contact. Shows min date between both records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Reference field for the Initial Setup Call Completed Date populated on the Account OR SaaS Primary Contact. If Initial Setup Call Completed is blank on the Combined Funnel record, this field can be used to quickly/easily manually populate that field to the correct date on the CF record.
CustomField.label: Initial Setup Call Completed
